title: EA Fitness Result
description: The canonical result of one fitness-function evaluation. Both the static layer (ea-archrules FitnessHarness, OPA/conftest gates) and the dynamic layer (SLO exporters) emit this shape, keyed by `system`, so the EA portfolio scorecard rolls verdicts up per P&L / domain over time.

system.description: Registry system id (the SSOT key, e.g. `ecommerce-inventory`). The scorecard joins on this to resolve owner / P&L / domain.

layer.description: Where in the delivery path the function ran: code = CI ArchUnit/OPA, contract = consumer-driven/JSON contract, runtime = production SLO/metric budget.

verdict.description: pass = clean; warn = violations but non-blocking (warn mode); fail = enforced violation (blocked); waived = enforced but time-boxed waiver active; skipped = n/a for this system.

mode.description: The configured enforcement mode for this rule on this system (from the registry). Null for emitters with no registry concept.

violations.description: Count of violations. 0 on pass/skipped. For a runtime SLO, 0 = within budget, >=1 = over budget (e.g. number of breaching windows).

waiverExpires.description: ISO date the active waiver expires (only on `waived`); null otherwise. Feeds the waiver-aging panel.

source.description: Emitter id, e.g. `ea-archrules`, `conftest`, `slo-exporter`. Lets the scorecard attribute results to a tier without inferring.
